benefits.description: Regular dental check-ups are crucial for maintaining good oral health and preventing serious dental issues.

items.title: Cost Savings

questions.question: How often should I get a dental check-up?
questions.answer: We recommend check-ups every 6 months for most patients. However, some may need more frequent visits based on their oral health needs.

questions.question: What happens during a dental check-up?
questions.answer: During your check-up, we'll examine your teeth, gums, and mouth, take necessary X-rays, clean your teeth, and discuss any findings or concerns.

questions.question: Are dental X-rays safe?
questions.answer: Yes, our digital X-rays use minimal radiation and are completely safe with proper protection. We only take X-rays when necessary.

questions.question: How long does a check-up take?
questions.answer: A typical check-up appointment takes about 30-45 minutes, depending on your individual needs and whether you're due for X-rays.

cta.title: Ready to Schedule Your Check-up?
cta.description: Take the first step towards better oral health with a comprehensive dental check-up.
